calendar.matters:
PETITION Petition For Approval Of Proposed Act By Attorneys-In-Fact
Off Calendar Oct-07-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Richard Lawrence Green and Rebecca Renzas for Robert B. Friend.

Mr. Green stated that he has represented this family for years, that their main goal was to pass as much on to their children as possible, that the United States Congress hasn't changed the gift tax law, that the savings to the children would be anywhere from one to two and a half million dollars, and that this would still leave Mrs. Friend with substantial liquid assets. In addition, Mr. Green presented an update on Mrs. Friend stating that her physical health remains stable, that she has round the clock care, that mentally she is not there, and that the tax savings is an important issue. The Court granted the petition (subject to review of the order).

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda.
